name: FreelanceDeliverable
description: A file, draft, or piece of content produced for a Freelance Job

deliverable_type.description: document | code | image | archive | report | message_draft

content_preview.description: Safe text preview or snippet of the work

file_url.description: Link to the uploaded asset if applicable

external_reference.description: Link to external platform draft or cloud doc

status.description: draft | staged | review_requested | approved | delivery_staged | delivered_manually | revision_requested | archived

approval_mission_id.description: Reference to the Action Engine review mission

delivery_message_id.description: Reference to the staged delivery message
